policy.closure_rule: cargo fmt --check is allowed to fail on tracked files only for the exact files listed in this artifact
policy.new_drift_rule: any current rustfmt drift in a tracked file outside quarantine.files is a bead-owned validation failure
policy.stale_artifact_rule: if cargo fmt --check passes or the drift file set changes, regenerate this artifact or close the quarantine by formatting the listed files
policy.changed_file_rule: feature beads must still prove their own touched Rust files are formatted

quarantine.reason: cargo fmt --check now passes for tracked workspace files; the previous broad drift quarantine was stale
